title: Regional Forum Bengaluru: Completed Event Details and Mission
text: Regional forum in Bengaluru Event Status: Completed Date: July 12, 2025 Location: National Academy For Learning, Karnataka State, South India, 3rd Cross Rd, 3rd Block, West Of Chord Road, 3rd Stage, Basaveshwar Nagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560079, India Recommended for: Potential applicants The IC3 Regional Forums are a mission-driven effort to bring counseling to every school. At the heart of the forums lies the belief that every student deserves access to guidance and clarity to build a fulfilling future. Open address in Google Maps
summary: This completed regional forum in Bengaluru focused on providing counseling and guidance to students through the IC3 Regional Forums initiative, held at the National Academy For Learning.
